role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and stayed silent.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (Opuntia, scrubland).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species (Opuntia) and their regional distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, shoulders, and utility pole infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain knowledge (building styles, image quality) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Mexico as the ground truth. The agents provided solid, image-grounded evidence (Opuntia, brickwork, poles). The initial region decision was flawed (choosing South America over Central America/North America), but the tournament bracket correctly pitted the strongest candidates against each other and selected the winner based on diagnostic features.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the semi-arid scrub and cacti.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the road and poles.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the brick building and pole style.
